title: Interviews of Paramedics 2010
description: The data consist of transcribed interviews of 17 paramedics in Finland. Three interviews were conducted at a private health care service provider and five were conducted at a public one. The paramedics were interviewed in pairs with the exception of one three-person group. The interviews were part of a wider ethnographic field study and they were conducted during the shifts of the paramedics.
